name: Sorcerer
summary: Spontaneous arcane caster. Magic flows from a bloodline rather than from study. Limited spells known but cast freely from those.

class_features.name: Bloodline
class_features.summary: Pick a bloodline. Grants a bonus class skill, a 1st-level bloodline power, additional bloodline spells known at higher levels, and an arcana.

class_features.name: Eschew Materials
class_features.summary: Bonus feat: cast arcane spells without material components costing 1 gp or less.

class_features.name: Cantrips
class_features.summary: Knows the chosen cantrips; cast at will.
